html:
Exclusive to:

Driftwood Pieces are Items exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them.

They can be found floating in the Ocean where they spawn regularly. They are common in the Rocky Beach Biome on the Lunar Island. Driftwood Pieces can also be obtained by chopping Driftwood and Great Tree Trunk roots.

Driftwood Pieces are required to craft Driftwood Oars. They can also be used to repair Boats and as Fuel for Fire.

Trivia

  • Driftwood Pieces were introduced in the Turn of Tides update.
